name: Glunz & Jensen Holding A/S
summary: Glunz & Jensen Holding A/S develops, produces, and supplies solutions for the prepress industry worldwide. It offers offset products, such as processors, iCtP plate writers, offset prepress products, and plateline products; and flexo products, including all-in-one systems, exposure units, processors, finishers and dryers, trimmers and mounting tables, letterpresses, and other flexo products. The company also provides spare parts kits; iCtP consumables and accessories; offset accessories; and flexo accessories, as well as after sales services. It markets its products through a network of distributors and dealers. The company was formerly known as Glunz & Jensen A/S and changed its name to Glunz & Jensen Holding A/S in December 2016. Glunz & Jensen Holding A/S was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Nyborg, Denmark.
